title: LED Desk Lamp with Swing Arm for Home Office, 1200LM Dimmable Desk Light for Study, Reading, Adjustable Table Lamp Task Light for Home Working, Desktop Lighting for Video Calls Streaming
features: [ Brighten and Softer ]: The LitONES modern desk lamp delivers 1200 lumens, with 3 color temperatures (cool light, white light, warm light) and 10 brightness levels to perfectly suit your lighting needed. Black task lamps use innovative CRI >97 (close to day light) and advanced edge-lit LED technology, providing glare-free, soft, and even illumination that's eye caring perfect for reading, drafting, or any work that demands precision and comfort, ensuring eye protection for long hours.

[ Stable and Versatile ]: This LED study desk lamp features a solid metal base that keeps it steady, no matter how you angle it. Unlike desk clamp lamps, there's no need to consider desk thickness or wall placement. Set it up wherever you need perfect lighting: beside your bed or sofa for a cozy read, on your desk for focused tasks, next to your computer for clear video calls, or even by your table nail station, sewing, make up for detailed work. The choice is yours!

[ Ultimate Flexibility] : Led desktop lights with swing arm features 5 pivot joints and a max height of 33 inches,Provides a higher and wider range of lighting.Its 7 inch full screen lamp head and pivots rotate between 180°and 360°, offering ideal flexibility for college dorm room, bedroom, living room and others. Built with durable, sturdy damping pivots designed to withstand up to 200,000 adjustments, this lamp is made for long-lasting, reliable performance.

[ Multi functions ]: This dimmable desktop monitor light offers soft-touch controls, along with memory, dimming, and 1H/half timer functions to adapt seamlessly to tasks like drawing, writing, crafting, and coding. Whether you're solving puzzles, painting, or working on school arts and crafts, this versatile lamp fits right in. From your office to your bedroom, headboards, or workbench, its multi-angle adjustability offers the perfect light for every room and activity.

[ More than just a desk light] : The Litones home office desk lamp doesn’t just illuminate your workspace, it’s designed to enhance your look, too. With an taller adjustable lamp head, it easily transforms from a tall desk lamp to a ring light for video.Blending style and functionality, this versatile lamp offers soft lighting for your office, remote work, studying, reading, gaming, vlogging, and more.

[ Premium Quality and Durability ]: Made from aerospace-grade aluminum, this architect lamp is designed to go the distance with LED lights rated for 100,000 hours and a sturdy pivot built to handle over 200,000 adjustments. Its eye-friendly design ensures comfort during long hours of use, making it as practical as it is durable. Built to stand the test of time, it comes with a 2-year warranty and lifetime technical support.
description: Product Description Upgraded Edge-Lit Ultimate Desk & Video Lamp-from Productivity to Presence Versatile Lighting, Endless Comfort - Perfect for Work, Study, Task,Reading, And Other Scenarios LitONES Desk Lamp with Soft and Even Illumination, CRI >95 Previous page Next page LitONES Desk Lamp Makes The Light Glare-Free, Soft And Even Illumination To Protect Your Eyes. LitONES Desk lamp not only brightens you up in video conferencing, zoom meetings, video calls, but also provides you with quality lighting in remote working, home office, study, podcasting, video recording, live streaming, YouTube, photoshoot, gaming,vlogging
